title: Korak 52

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),
            (special_chars, r'\W')
        ]        

    return password

# new_password = generate_password(8)
# print(new_password)

import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),
            (special_chars, r'\W')
        ]        

    return password

tests.text: Drugi element u vašem četvorodimenzionalnom tuplu treba da bude niz znakova fr'[{symbols}]'.

description: Sada, spoji ga sa svojim izvorno nizom znakova i f-string-om, pa ubaci svoju varijablu symbols unutar niza. Zapamti da možeš postaviti varijablu unutar f-string-a koristeći vitičaste zagrade { }.
